description_long: This object is a pair of sunglasses with a modern, minimalist design. The lenses are large, slightly rectangular with rounded edges, and appear to be darkly tinted, providing significant coverage for the eyes. The frame is thin and subtle, with no visible embellishments or decorative elements, and the temples are straight and slender, attaching at the upper corners of the lenses. The bridge is narrow and unobtrusive, connecting the lenses seamlessly. There are small, rounded nose pads visible, suggesting comfort for extended wear. No brand logo or insignia is visible on any part of the glasses.
description: A sleek, minimalist pair of sunglasses with dark, rectangular lenses and thin, straight temples. The design is simple and modern, with no visible branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full shape of the dark, rectangular lenses and the thin, minimal frame.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thinness of the frame and the straight, slender temples extending back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the lenses, the attachment points of the temples, and the nose pads.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the slim profile of the frame and temples.
attribute_frame_design: The frame is thin, minimalist, and rectangular with rounded corners. It features a semi-rimless style, with the frame primarily along the top edge of the lenses and minimal structure along the bottom. The temples are straight and slender, attaching at the upper outer corners of the lenses.
attribute_lens_tint: The lenses are darkly tinted, appearing nearly black and opaque, with no visible gradient or special effects.
attribute_bridge_style: The bridge is a simple, narrow bar connecting the two lenses, with small, rounded nose pads attached for comfort.
attribute_temple_detailing: The temples are straight, thin, and unadorned, with no visible patterns, engravings, or embellishments.
